prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
# Rainy Sunday Lunch for Old Friends

## First Course
Roasted Butternut Squash Soup with Thyme Croutons and Brown Butter

## Main Course
Red Wine Braised Short Ribs with Creamy Polenta and Glazed Root Vegetables

## Dessert
Warm Apple and Blackberry Crumble with Vanilla Bean Custard
